sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114249" key="xno/i+os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χνόϊος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">downy,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παρειή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
